field.name: help
field.p: Sistemde durumu "İzleme Açık" (Yeşil) olan hiçbir proje bulunamadı!

details.style: margin-bottom: 5px; border: 1px solid #dee2e6; border-radius: 4px; overflow: hidden; background-color: #fff;

summary.style: cursor: pointer; padding: 5px 8px; background-color: #f8f9fa; font-size: 11px; font-weight: bold; list-style: none; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin: 0;

a.name: action_open_project_mos
a.style: text-decoration: none; color: inherit; display: block; cursor: pointer;
a.title: Üretim Emirlerini Aç

details.style: margin-bottom: 5px; border: 1px solid #dee2e6; border-radius: 4px; overflow: hidden; background-color: #fff;

summary.style: cursor: pointer; padding: 5px 8px; background-color: #f8f9fa; font-size: 11px; font-weight: bold; list-style: none; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin: 0;

div.style: padding: 8px; border-top: 1px solid #dee2e6; font-size: 10px; color: #6c757d; text-align: center;

details.style: border: 1px solid #dee2e6; border-radius: 4px; overflow: hidden; background-color: #fff;

summary.style: cursor: pointer; padding: 5px 8px; background-color: #f8f9fa; font-size: 11px; font-weight: bold; list-style: none; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin: 0;

div.style: padding: 8px; border-top: 1px solid #dee2e6; font-size: 10px; color: #6c757d; text-align: center;
